title_en: Friday’s Racing Insights: Full-Sister To Munnings Has Another Foal Ready To Hit The Track
description: 5th-CD, $120K, Msw, 3yo/up, f&m, 5fT, 2:47 p.m. ET. Speight's Comete (Speightstown), the full-sister of current sire Munnings , has her third foal ready to hit the track at Churchill Downs. READY COMETE (More Than Ready) is a Charles Fipke homebred who was sent to Dallas Stewart.
